title: SDE Intern
description: Built a Python client-server security application using TCP and MySQL to manage network-wide USB access, implementing a VID/PID whitelist for 500+ authorized devices. Deployed to 50% of company systems, achieving 30% reduction in unauthorized access incidents; verified 1000+ requests/second under load.

title: SDE Intern
description: Built a real-time Haskell streaming pipeline replacing legacy batch ETLs, cutting transaction analytics latency from hours to seconds. Added features to the SDK data pipeline; optimized ClickHouse via TTLs and materialized view rollups. Enhanced an R-based accuracy framework to auto-detect and alert on PostgreSQL/ClickHouse discrepancies.

title: SDE
description: Elevated UPI real-time pipeline data accuracy from 90% to 99.98% via root-cause analysis and deep Haskell debugging. Took full ownership of the streaming pipeline, resolving critical production issues to minimize downtime. Developed a new transactions sessionizer and re-architected the mv_txns pipeline, migrating the two most-used analytics tables off legacy ETLs.
